footnotes.F1: The sale was effected pursuant to a Rule 10b-5 trading plan adopted by the reporting person on June 8, 2021.
footnotes.F2: The price reported in column 4 is a weighted average price. These shares were sold in multiple transactions ranging from $51.00 to $51.01, inclusive. The Reporting Person undertakes to provide to the issuer, any security holder of the issuer, or the staff of the Securities and Exchange Commission, upon request, full information regarding the number of shares sold at each separate price within the ranges set in this footnote.
